eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Albany, WY; at 5:13 PM on JUL 1, 2026 Effective until 6:13 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: GO! Evacuate Now! Half Mile Radius of FS 707A and Headquarters Rd due to fire in the area of Blair Wallis picnic area and the Horse Camp Albany County, WY
